description: Represents a runtime instance of a workflow step in an EC2 Image Builder workflow execution. Workflow step executions are created automatically when an image build runs a workflow.

StepExecutionId.description: The unique identifier for the workflow step execution.
StepExecutionId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier for the workflow step execution.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^step-[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

WorkflowExecutionId.description: The unique identifier that Image Builder assigned to keep track of runtime details when it ran the workflow.
WorkflowExecutionId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier that Image Builder assigned to keep track of runtime details when it ran the workflow.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^wf-[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

WorkflowBuildVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the build version for the Image Builder workflow resource that defines this workflow step.
WorkflowBuildVersionArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the build version for the Image Builder workflow resource that defines this workflow step.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ImageBuildVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the image resource build version that the specified runtime instance of the workflow step creates.
ImageBuildVersionArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the image resource build version that the specified runtime instance of the workflow step creates.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.description: The name of the specified runtime instance of the workflow step.
Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the specified runtime instance of the workflow step.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9-_]{1,99}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Action.description: The name of the action that the specified step performs.
Action.markdownDescription:
The name of the action that the specified step performs.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9-_]{1,99}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Status.description: The current status for the specified runtime version of the workflow step.
Status.markdownDescription:
The current status for the specified runtime version of the workflow step.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: PENDING | SKIPPED | RUNNING | COMPLETED | FAILED | CANCELLED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Inputs.description: Input parameters that Image Builder provided for the specified runtime instance of the workflow step.
Inputs.markdownDescription:
Input parameters that Image Builder provided for the specified runtime instance of the workflow step.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Outputs.description: The file names that the specified runtime version of the workflow step created as output.
Outputs.markdownDescription:
The file names that the specified runtime version of the workflow step created as output.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

StartTime.description: The timestamp when the specified runtime version of the workflow step started.
StartTime.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the specified runtime version of the workflow step started.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

EndTime.description: The timestamp when the specified runtime instance of the workflow step finished.
EndTime.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the specified runtime instance of the workflow step finished.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

OnFailure.description: The action to perform if the workflow step fails.
OnFailure.markdownDescription:
The action to perform if the workflow step fails.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TimeoutSeconds.description: The maximum duration in seconds for this step to complete its action.
TimeoutSeconds.markdownDescription:
The maximum duration in seconds for this step to complete its action.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
